leaves.name: Mine State Aggregates
leaves.description: Coal shipments aggregated at state-level data, including price, quantity, quality, and rank. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Receipts
leaves.description: Coal shipment detailed by reciepient data, including transportation type, supplier, mine, coal basin, county, state, rank, contract type, price, quantity, and quality. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://w

leaves.name: Mine Aggregates
leaves.description: Coal shipments aggregated at mine-level data, including price, quantity, quality, and rank. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Plant State Aggregates
leaves.description: Coal reciepts aggregated at state-level data, including price, quantity, quality, and rank. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Plant Aggregates
leaves.description: Coal reciepts aggregated to plant-level data, including price, quantity, quality, and rank. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: By Mine, By Plant
leaves.description: Coal shipments from mine- to plant-level data, including price, quantity, quality, and rank. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Consumption and Quality
leaves.description: Coal consumption and quality data by state and sector, including price, reciepts, heat content, sulfur content, ash content, and stocks. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

facets.description: U.S. Total, States, and Census Regions.

leaves.name: Aggregate Production
leaves.description: Coal state aggregated data by mine type, includes production, productivity, labor hours, employees, and coal rank. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Exports\Imports Quantity\Price
leaves.description: Coal import/export data, including price, quantity, country, rank, and customs district. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Market Sales Price
leaves.description: Coal market sales prices and amounts by mine types for regions and states (unless withheld for pricing protections). Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Mine Production
leaves.description: Coal mine-level data, including production, region, state, county, rank, status, type, name and description. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Price by Rank
leaves.description: Coal prices by rank data for region and state. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Reserves Capacity
leaves.description: Coal capacity data, including productive capacity, stocks, and recoverable reserves by state, region and mine type. Source: EIA Form 7A and MSHA Form 7000-2. Interactive browser: https://www.eia.gov/coal/data/browser/

leaves.name: Crude Oil Imports
leaves.description: Crude oil imports by country to destination, includes type, grade, quantity. Source: EIA-814 Interactive data product: www.eia.gov/petroleum/imports/companylevel/

leaves.name: Electricity Sales to Ultimate Customers
leaves.description: Electricity sales to ultimate customer by state and sector (number of customers, average price, revenue, and megawatthours of sales). Sources: Forms EIA-826, EIA-861, EIA-861M

leaves.name: Electric Power Operations (Annual and Monthly)
leaves.description: Monthly and annual electric power operations by state, sector, and energy source. Source: Form EIA-923

leaves.name: Hourly Demand, Demand Forecast, Generation, and Interchange
leaves.description: Hourly demand, day-ahead demand forecast, net generation, and interchange by balancing authority. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Hourly Generation by Energy Source
leaves.description: Hourly net generation by balancing authority and energy source. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Hourly Demand by Subregion
leaves.description: Hourly demand by balancing authority subregion. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Hourly Interchange by Neighboring Balancing Authority
leaves.description: Daily interchange between neighboring balancing authorities. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Daily Demand, Demand Forecast, Generation, and Interchange
leaves.description: Daily demand, day-ahead demand forecast, net generation, and interchange by balancing authority. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Daily Demand by Subregion
leaves.description: Daily demand by balancing authority subregion. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Daily Generation by Energy Source
leaves.description: Daily net generation by balancing authority and energy source. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Daily Interchange by Neighboring Balancing Authority
leaves.description: Hourly interchange between neighboring balancing authorities. Source: Form EIA-930 Product: Hourly Electric Grid Monitor

leaves.name: Emissions from Energy Consumption at Conventional Power Plants and Combined-Heat-and-Power Plants
leaves.description: Emissions from electricity generation and the production of useful thermal output at conventional power plants and combined-heat-and-power plants. See Electric Power Annual, Technical Notes for a description of the sources and methodology u

leaves.name: Supply and disposition of electricity
leaves.description: Supply and disposition of electricity by state. Sources: Forms EIA-860, EIA-861, and EIA-923 Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 10

leaves.name: Generating Capacity
leaves.description: Electric generating capacity (summer capacity) by state, energy source, and sector. Source: Form EIA-860 Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 4

leaves.name: Costs and Savings from Energy Efficiency Programs
leaves.description: Costs and savings from energy efficiency programs by state and sector Source: Form EIA-861 Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 13

facets.description: Time Period Included in Costs and Savings

leaves.name: Electricity Net Metering: Customers and Capacity
leaves.description: Electricity net metering customer counts and capacity by state, sector, and generating technology. Source: Form EIA-861 Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 11

leaves.name: Advanced Metering Infrastructure
leaves.description: Advanced meterting counts by technology, state, and sector Source: Forms EIA-861, EIA-861S Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 12

leaves.name: State Rankings for Key Statistics
leaves.description: State rankings for key electricity statistics by state Source: Forms EIA-860, EIA-861, EIA-923 Product: State Electricity Profiles, Table 1

leaves.name: Inventory of Operable Generators
leaves.description: Inventory of operable generators in the U.S. Source: Forms EIA-860, EIA-860M

leaves.name: Electric Power Operations for Individual Power Plants (Annual and Monthly)
leaves.description: Annual and monthly electric power operations for individual power plants, by energy source and prime mover Source: Form EIA-923

leaves.name: International
leaves.description: Country level production, consumption, imports, exports by energy source (petroleum, natural gas, electricity, renewable, etc.) Interactive product: https://www.eia.gov/international/data/world

leaves.name: U.S. Nuclear Outages
leaves.description: Nuclear outages daily with capacity, outages, and percent outage. Source: Nuclear Regulatory Commission's Power Reactor Status Report. Interactive data report: Daily Status of Nuclear Reactors.

leaves.name: Generator Level Nuclear Outages
leaves.description: Generator level nuclear outages with capacity, outages, and percent outage. Source: Nuclear Regulatory Commission's Power Reactor Status Report. Interactive data report: Daily Status of Nuclear Reactors.

leaves.name: Facility Level Nuclear Outages
leaves.description: Facility level nuclear outages with capacity, outages, and percent outage. Source: Nuclear Regulatory Commission's Power Reactor Status Report. Interactive data report: Daily Status of Nuclear Reactors.

leaves.name: State Energy Data System (SEDS)
leaves.description: Estimated production, consumption, price, and expenditure data for all energy sources by state and sector. Source: https://www.eia.gov/state/seds/seds-technical-notes-complete.php Product: SEDS (https://www.eia.gov/state/seds/)

leaves.name: Short Term Energy Outlook
leaves.description: Monthly short term (18 month) projections using STEO model. Report and interactive projection data browser: STEO (www.eia.gov/steo/)

leaves.name: Capacity by Region
leaves.description: Densified biomass capacity includes number of facilities and number of employees. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Sales and Price by Region
leaves.description: Densified biomass sales and average price by region. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Export Sales and Price
leaves.description: Densified biomass export prices and quantity. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Feedstocks and Costs
leaves.description: Densified biomass feedstocks and cost by type. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Production by Region
leaves.description: Densified biomass production by region and fuel type. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Characteristics by Region
leaves.description: Densified biomass characteristics includes fuel type, average ash, heat, and moisture content by region. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Inventories by Region
leaves.description: Densified biomass inventories by region and fuel type. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Wood Pellet Plant Capacity
leaves.description: Details on wood pellet plants includes region, respondent, capacity, and status. Source: EIA-63C Report: www.eia.gov/biomass/

leaves.name: Total Energy
leaves.description: These data represent the most recent comprehensive energy statistics integrated across all energy sources. The data includes total energy production, consumption, stocks, and trade; energy prices; overviews of petroleum, natural gas, coal,
